verses.dev: सश्रूत्वा तु पितरं वृत्तं भ्रातरौ च विवासितौ।भरतो दुःखसन्तप्त इदं वचनमब्रवीत्
verses.trans: On hearing about the demise of the father and his two brothers sent in exile, Bharata overtaken by sorrow spoke thus:

verses.dev: किं नु कार्यं हतस्येह मम राज्येन शोचतः।विहीनस्याथ पित्रा च भ्रात्रा पितृसमेन च
verses.trans: Bereft of my father and my brother who was like a father to me, of what avail is this kingdom to me when I am grieving and fallen into misfortunes?

words.m: like to a father to me

verses.dev: दुःखे मे दुःखमकरोर्व्रणे क्षारमिवादधाः।राजानं प्रेतभावस्थं कृत्वा रामं च तापसम्
verses.trans: You have caused the death of the king and reduced Rama to an ascetic. You have piled one sorrow over sorrow on me like rubbing salt to the wound

words.m: another sorrow, (मे) अकरोः you have caused

verses.dev: कुलस्य त्वमभावाय कालरात्रिरिवाऽगता।अङ्गारमुपगूह्य स्म पिता मे नावबुद्धवान्
verses.trans: You have come here for the destruction of this race, like a fatal night. My father did not realize that he was embracing a live charcoal.

verses.dev: मृत्युमापादितो पिता त्वया मे पापदर्शिनि।सुखं परिहृतं मोहात्कुलेऽस्मिन्कुलपांसनि
verses.trans: O woman of sinful thoughts, you have brought about the death of my father. O obloquy of the race, by your folly you have deprived this family of its happiness.

verses.dev: त्वां प्राप्य हि पिता मेऽद्य सत्यसन्धो महायशाः।तीव्रदुःखाभिसन्तप्तो वृत्तो दशरथो नृपः
verses.trans: My father king Dasaratha who is bound to truth and highly renowned, having come under your influence and tormented by intense grief has departed from this world.

verses.dev: विनाशितो महाराजः पिता मे धर्मवत्सलः।कस्मात्प्रव्राजितो रामः कस्मादेव वनं गतः
verses.trans: Why was my father the righteous maharaja killed? Why was Rama exiled into the forest?

verses.dev: कौसल्या च सुमित्रा च पुत्रशोकाभिपीडिते।दुष्करं यदि जीवेतां प्राप्य त्वां जननीं मम
verses.trans: Tormented by the grief of separation from their sons, it is difficult for Kausalya and Sumitra to survive under you, O my mother.

words.m: tormented by the grief on account of separation from their sons

verses.dev: ननुत्वार्योऽपि धर्मात्मा त्वयि वृतिमनुत्तमाम्।वर्तते गुरुवृत्तिज्ञो यथा मातरि वर्तते
verses.trans: My noble and righteous brother (Rama), who is well aware of his duties to the elders conducted himself before you as he would before his own mother.

words.m: well aware of his duties towards elders
noble, too  मातरि towards his mother

verses.dev: तथा ज्येष्ठा हि मे माता कौसल्या दीर्घदर्शिनी।त्वयि धर्मं समास्थाय भगिन्यामिव वर्तते
verses.trans: In the same way my eldest mother the farsighted Kausalya, too adhered to righteousness and conducted herself towards you like a sister.
